docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LONDON TERRACE GARDENS, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL J SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-08-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-19-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-08-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND ALSO CONTINUED FOR STATUS CONFERENCE 7/16/93. PLTF. MUST GIVE NOTICE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-16-1993 CONTINUED FROM JUN-08-1993 TO JUL-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
